message:
test(fcp-host,fcp-audit): expand doctor and audit test suites

- doctor.rs: +63 tests (86→149) — enum serde roundtrips, DoctorRequest
  edge cases, report checks, self-check status, transport policy,
  boundary conditions, timestamp validation, schema version format
- fcp-audit: +78 tests (173→251) — severity edge cases, TraceContext,
  AuditEntry deeper tests, builder edge cases, ChainHead, Decision,
  DecisionReceipt, AuditFilter, VerifyIssue, verify_chain scenarios,
  AuditError variants, FreshnessLevel, AuditStatus, VerifyStatus

fcp-host lib: 1233 tests, fcp-audit lib: 251 tests — all passing

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
